title: 'Honey Lemon Soda' Concludes Ten-Year Serialization
content: Mayu Murata 's Honey Lemon Soda will conclude in the May 2026 issue of Ribon Magazine on April 3. The 124th chapter will mark the end of its 10-year serialization. Murata began serializing the school romance manga in Ribon Magazine in December 2015.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Tiger & Bunny Anime Gets Stage Play to Celebrate 15th Anniversary
content: The original Tiger & Bunny television anime series centers around heroes for hire — super powered beings known as NEXT who wear sponsor logos while fighting crime on live television.
author: ANN

title: Gachiakuta RPG Reveals New Character Trailers
content: The official YouTube channels for Com2uS Group's RPG Gachiakuta : The Game , based on Kei Urana 's Gachiakuta manga, released character trailers previewing the combat for Zanka, Enjin, Rudo, and Riyo on Monday.
author: ANN

title: The Ogre's Bride Live-Action Film Opens at #3, Poupelle of Chimney Town Anime at #5 in Japan
content: The 2026 Doraemon film , Eiga Doraemon: Shin Nobita no Kaitei Kiganjō ( Doraemon the Movie: New Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil ), stayed at #1 in its fifth weekend at the Japanese box office last weekend.
author: ANN

title: LINE Yahoo Gains Control of Kakao Games Following Stake Acquisition (Updated)
content: LINE Yahoo! has become the largest shareholder of Kakao Games following a recent stake acquisition, marking a shift in the company's ownership structure. Kakao Games CEO Sang-woo Han said on March 26 that no specific management changes or organizational restructuring have been decided.
author: ANN

title: 5 Anime Coming to HIDIVE in April 2026
content: The exciting Winter 2026 anime season is almost nearing its end as fans prepare for new series to drop in Spring. The first season of the year includes some of the greatest anime ever, including the sequel seasons of Jujutsu Kaisen, Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End, and more.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Releases a New Slate of Anime Coming in April and May
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and Netflix has confirmed a new list of series coming to the platform. 2026 is turning out to be one of the most exciting years for anime fans.
author: ComicBook

title: Dorohedoro Star Talks The Biggest Change in Season 2: “The Story Becomes More Complex”
content: The Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and it brings a new range of exciting debuts and sequels. One of the series returning with a sequel in Spring 2026 is MAPPA’s underrated dark fantasy Dorohedoro .
author: ComicBook

title: The Apothecary Diaries Cast Gets a New Summer Look Ahead of Season 3
content: The Apothecary Diaries will be returning with its Season 3 in October this year as part of the Fall 2026 lineup. While fans await the anime’s return, the series is returning in Summer 2026 with a special Summer Garden Party event.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Years Later, Beloved Shonen Anime Is Officially Coming to Netflix
content: The first month of the highly anticipated Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and Netflix is bringing several surprises for fans. From new series to the reviving older classics, the platform doesn’t have a shortage of anime being added to its library this season.
author: ComicBook
